scripts.build:edge: node -e "const p=require('path').resolve(__dirname,'../../../softshape-print-agent/softshape-print-agent/edge-server');process.chdir(p);require('child_process').execSync('bun install && bun build --compile server.ts --outfile edge-server.exe',{stdio:'inherit'})"
scripts.build:edge:check: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path').resolve(__dirname,'../../../softshape-print-agent/softshape-print-agent/edge-server/edge-server.exe');if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.error('ERROR: edge-server.exe not found at '+p+'. Run npm run build:edge first.');process.exit(1);}else{console.log('OK: edge-server.exe found ('+fs.statSync(p).size+' bytes)');}"
scripts.tauri:build: npm run build:edge && npm run build:edge:check && tauri build
